title: The Cave Dweller VR Experience!
description: Wanna play the Cave Dweller Mod in VR? Well this mod pack will let you do just that in the most immersive and scary way possible!
body:
This VR modpack centers around the new [Cave Dweller mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller). I wanted to make this a scary expirence in Virtual reality so this mod pack also has sound and lighting mods that will help add atmosphere to the already terrifying Cave Dweller Mod. Hope you enjoy! 

Ryan :)

This mod pack uses the following mods:

Vivecraft 
VrAPI
ImmersiveMC 
Architectury
Ambient Sounds 
Cavenoise Nightmare (cavedweller)
Creative Core
Darkness
Dynamic Lights
Eating animation
Falling Leaves
Gekolib
Presence Footsteps
Soundphysics
Starlight
YungsAPI
Yungs Better Desert Temples
Yungs Better Dungeons
Yungs Better Ocean Monuments
Yungs Better Nether Fortresses 
Yungs Better Strongholds
Yungs Better Witch Huts
Yungs Extras
